---
id: set-post-filter
title: "Set Post Filter"
description: "This operation is used to set a post-filter for RFID device, enabling the filtering of tags scanned by the device based on specific criteria."
sidebar_label: "Set Post Filter"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/gen-2-x-api-reference
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Set Post Filter"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/set_post_filter"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This operation is used to set a post-filter for RFID device, enabling the filtering of tags scanned by the device based on specific criteria.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","description":"Specifies the name of the command to be executed. In this case, it is set_post_filter."},"requestId":{"type":"string","description":"A unique identifier for the request. This ensures traceability and prevents duplicate processing of the same request."},"postFilterPayload":{"title":"postFilterPayload","x-stoplight":{"id":"y5oysu0o0kuvb"},"type":"object","properties":{"operation":{"type":"string","enum":["ADD","DELETE","MODIFY"],"description":"Specifies the operation to perform on the filter such as add a new filter, remove and update an existing filter.\n"},"dataEpType":{"type":"string","description":"Specifies the data endpoint to which the filter should be applied.  Two data endpoints are supported for reporting filtered tag data.\n","enum":["DATA_EP1","DATA_EP2"]},"matchPattern":{"type":"string","description":"Defines the value to match for the filter.  For prefix and suffix filters, only hexadecimal digits are allowed, and the number of digits must be even. When a prefix filter is used, select filters cannot be applied.\n"},"matchPatternMethod":{"type":"string","enum":["PREFIX","SUFFIX","REGEX"],"example":"REGEX","description":"Specifies the method used to match the tag ID.  `PREFIX`: Matches the beginning of the tag ID. `SUFFIX`: Matches the end of the tag ID. `REGEX`: Matches the tag ID using a regular expression.\n"},"reportOperation":{"type":"string","enum":["INCLUDE","EXCLUDE"],"description":"Specifies the filter operation to apply.  `INCLUDE`: Only tags matching the filter criteria will be reported. `EXCLUDE`: Tags matching the filter criteria will be excluded from reporting.\n"},"reportDuration":{"type":"integer","description":"Specifies the duration (in seconds) to wait before reporting a tag again after it has already been reported.  This feature is currently not supported. The filter ensures that as long as the tag is being read by the reader, it will not be reported again until the specified duration has elapsed.\n","minimum":0},"seenCount":{"type":"integer","description":"Specifies the number of times a tag must be detected before its data is sent out.  This helps in filtering out tags that are inconsistently read. This feature is currently not supported.\n","minimum":0},"tagList":{"type":"object","properties":{"operation":{"type":"string","enum":["BLACKLIST","WHITELIST"],"example":"BLACKLIST","description":"Specifies whether the tag should be blacklisted or whitelisted.  `BLACKLIST`: Excludes tags matching the patterns from reporting. `WHITELIST`: Includes only tags matching the patterns for reporting. This feature is currently not supported.\n"},"tagPatterns":{"type":"array","description":"An array of tag patterns to be used for whitelisting or blacklisting.  Multiple patterns can be provided to define the filter criteria. This feature is currently not supported.\n","items":{"type":"string","maxLength":100}}}},"rssiThreshold":{"type":"integer","format":"int32","description":"Specifies the RSSI threshold (in dBm).  Tags with an RSSI below this threshold will be ignored by the reader.  The value must be between -88 dBm (minimum sensitivity) and -26 dBm (maximum sensitivity). This feature is currently not supported.\n","minimum":-88,"maximum":-26}}}},"required":["command","requestId"]},"examples":{"Set post filter 1":{"description":"Payload to filter tags using prefix","value":{"command":"set_post_filter","requestId":"abc123","postFilterPayload":{"operation":"ADD","dataEpType":"DATA_EP1","matchPattern":"FFFFBBBBA500","matchPatternMethod":"PREFIX","reportOperation":"INCLUDE"}}},"Set post filter 2":{"description":"Payload to filter tags based on regex","value":{"command":"set_post_filter","requestId":"abc123","postFilterPayload":{"operation":"ADD","dataEpType":"DATA_EP1","matchPattern":"E280","matchPatternMethod":"REGEX","reportOperation":"EXCLUDE"}}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"default":{"description":"set_post_filter response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"set_post_filter"},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"abc123"},"apiVersion":{"type":"string","enum":["V1.0","V1.1"],"example":"V1.1"},"response":{"title":"response","x-stoplight":{"id":"1uzw0wye4si2y"},"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"integer","example":0,"description":"Response codes:\n\n| Code | Meaning |\n| --- | --- |\n| 0 | Success |\n| 1 | Command payload is accepted |\n| 2 | Invalid payload |\n| 3 | Not able to retrieve information |\n| 4 | Firmware update in progress |\n| 5 | Can't reboot device, inventory in progress |\n| 6 | Region is not configured |\n| 7 | Interface is not available |\n| 8 | Insufficient flash size |\n| 9 | File not found |\n| 10 | Configuration already exists |\n| 11 | Inventory in progress |\n| 12 | No Radio Operation in Progress |\n| 13 | Firmware update Failed |\n| 14 | Battery is low, Cannot update firmware |\n| 15 | WIFI Error - SSID not found |\n| 16 | WIFI Error - Cannot delete active SSID |\n| 17 | WIFI Error - SSID missed |\n| 18 | WIFI Error - SSID already exist |\n| 19 | WIFI Error - SSID count overflow |\n| 20 | Wifi is not supported |\n| 21 | Certificate not found |\n| 22 | Advanced configuration not set |\n| 23 | Invalid enum value |\n| 24 | Max 32 prefilters limit exceeded |\n| 25 | Max 3 publish topics exceeded |\n| 26 | Max 1 subscribe topic exceeded |\n| 27 | Invalid tenant ID length |\n| 28 | Tag match pattern length exceeded |\n| 29 | Url missing for HTTP source |\n| 30 | Certificate content missing for direct source |","minimum":0,"maximum":30},"description":{"type":"string","description":"response description in detail","example":"Success"}},"required":["code","description"]}},"required":["command","requestId","apiVersion","response"]},"examples":{"example1":{"value":{"command":"set_post_filter","requestId":"abc123","apiVersion":"V1.1","response":{"code":0,"description":"Success"}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
